name: iDream Learning App
description: iDream Learning App is an android Digital Learning App that offers lessons in English medium, Hindi, and some other local languages in India.

taxonomy.sub_category: iDream Learning App Updated on June 11, 2024 · Created on July 27, 2020 iDream Learning App iDream Learning App is an android Digital Learning App that offers lessons in English medium, Hindi, and some other local languages in India. Developed By iDream Education Tested By iDream Learning App Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description iDream Learning App is an android Digital Learning App which offers lessons in English, Hindi, and several other local languages in India. It covers subjects and skills for grades 1 to 12 as per NCERT and the State Boards. The app offers lessons from different subjects to suit different levels and curriculum in India. The app delivers animated video lessons for teaching, as well as activities and project making videos for students, and contains a library of books that users can access. It enables learners to practice any topic and get instant feedback, and also take tests which are embedded in the app. Target SDGs SDG 4: Quality Education SDG 10: Reduced Inequalities Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household Distributors / Implementing Organizations iDream Education Countries India Manufacturing/Building Method N/A Intellectural Property Type Select Type User Provision Model Users can download the App from the Play Store. Distributions to Date Status As of 2020, the app had been downloaded for more than 50,000 times. Telecommunication service required Mobile Internet or WiFi Level of connection service needed Minimum 3G connection Device(s) required Smartphone or tablet Additional features required None Permanent network connectivity required (Y/N[specify],Other [specify]) Y Two way communication (Y/N) Y Usage rate (%) Unknown Literacy support (Y (specify) /N) N Languages available (list) English Hindi Marathi Gujarati Tamil Telugu Kannada Bengali Operating system and version Android 4.1 and above Power requirements N/A eEducation application Education provider Design Specifications iDream Learning App is a free android app in English, Hindi, and several other languages in India for grades 1 to 12 as per NCERT and the State Boards. The App delivers animated video lessons for teaching, as well as activities and project making videos for students. These are meant to supplement their learning and happily engage them with in-home digital education. For Hindi and English medium, the app offers complete content for Classes 1st to 12th in Maths, EVS, Science, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, History, Civics, Geography, Political Science, Business Studies, Accountancy, Economics, English Grammar, Hindi Vyakaran, and Computers. In other local languages, most of the content is not complete and iDream Education is working on it. The app can be used by teachers to supplement learning, or parents to engage children with more learning at home. For advanced features such as usage reports, teacher dashboards, and integration to the school curriculum, users can contact iDream Education for integration. Technical Support Users can contact iDream Education via app@idreameducation.org Replacement Components N/A Lifecycle N/A Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters iDream Learning App aims to provide enjoyable digital learning in India with English medium and local language content for CBSE and State Boards. Vetted Performance Status Unknown Safety No known safety hazards are related to this product. Complementary Technical Systems iDream Education also offers learning tablets and smart ICT Lab for schools.
